title: RX5-TLN

'''RX5-TLN''' was an [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] stationed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gandle Ott]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] of the region. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], RX5-TLN was activated by [[CUTH-BRT-92-X3]], the planetary [[BRT supercomputer/Legends|BRT supercomputer]], under orders from Sarne to delay any [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces on Gandle Ott. Moff Sarne had recently been [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|chased]] from his [[Capital/Legends|capital]], [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]], by New Republic [[New Republic task force (Kal'Shebbol)|forces]], and had retreated to Gandle Ott. Aware of New Republic [[DarkStryder Campaign|pursuit]], the Moff took steps to delay and inconvenience the crew of the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]''. RX5-TLN attacked the command crew of the ''FarStar''—who had arrived at Gandle Ott [[Standard day/Legends|days]] after Sarne's departure and had stayed to open [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomatic]] relations—during a performance of the opera ''[[Madra Teene]]'' at the [[Theatre Danske]] in [[Montrol City]]. The resulting [[Lightfight|battle]] ended in the destruction of RX5-TLN.

==Biography==
RX5-TLN was an [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gandle Ott]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Put in place by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]] in case it was needed, RX5-TLN was left dormant to be activated by a remote command sent by the planetary [[BRT supercomputer/Legends|BRT supercomputer]], [[CUTH-BRT-92-X3]].<ref name="dirp" /> In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]],<ref name="Date" /> Moff Sarne was [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|deposed]] from his [[Capital/Legends|capital]] on [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic task force (Kal'Shebbol)|forces]]. The Moff retreated to Gandle Ott with his [[Moff Sarne's forces|fleet]], took on supplies, and stripped the [[Ott system|system]] of its [[Gandle Ott system defense force|defense force]]. To forestall any New Republic [[DarkStryder Campaign|pursuit]], Sarne had his primary agent on the planet, [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Olaver Lansel]], activate a series of command protocols in CUTH-BRT-92-X3 that made the [[Computer/Legends|computer]] obey Imperial commands without question. CUTH-BRT-92-X3 was ordered to delay any New Republic forces at Gandle Ott through any means at its disposal. Shortly after Sarne's departure from the planet, the New Republic [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' arrived in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]]. A delegation from the ''FarStar'' spent several [[Standard day/Legends|days]] on the planet establishing [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomatic]] relations. Throughout the course of the visit, CUTH-BRT-92-X3 tried several methods to incapacitate the New Republic delegation, without success.<ref name="dirp" />

On the fourth day of the visit, CUTH-BRT-92-X3 activated RX5-TLN. Once activated, RX5-TLN was completely separated from the networks controlled by CUTH-BRT-92-X3, meaning that the [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] could not be recalled by the computer. The [[Droid/Legends|droid's]] orders were to eliminate the command crew of the ''FarStar'' and disable the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]]. At the time of RX5-TLN's activation, the command crew of the ''FarStar'' was attending a performance of ''[[Madra Teene]]'', an opera telling of a droid uprising on a colonial world, at the [[Theatre Danske]] in [[Montrol City]]. The droid planned to ambush and [[Death/Legends|kill]] the [[Officer/Legends|officers]] at the opera, then proceed to the ''FarStar'', infiltrate the [[Starship/Legends|ship]], and use its in-built [[Torpedo/Legends|torpedoes]] to disable the vessel from within. After arriving at the Theatre Danske, RX5-TLN blended in with the cast of the opera, several of whom were dressed as assassin droids for the production. RX5-TLN made his way on stage during the performance, and attempted to kill the ''FarStar'' command crew members, who were sitting in the first two rows. The ''FarStar'' officers—including [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kaiya Adrimetrum]], [[Executive officer/Legends|First Officer]] [[Gorak Khzam]], and [[Chief engineer/Legends|Chief Engineer]] [[Lofryyhn]]—reacted to the attack, and began to battle the droid in the theater. The [[Lightfight|battle]] was fought throughout the building, including in the aisles, balconies, dressing rooms, backstage areas, and the orchestra pit. Eventually, RX5-TLN was destroyed by the ''FarStar'' officers. Shortly after, the ''FarStar'' crew left Gandle Ott in pursuit of Sarne, having learned that he was heading to the planet [[Shintel]].<ref name="dirp" />

==Characteristics==
RX5-TLN was a bipedal droid that stood 2.3 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] and had a cylindrical head. Covered in body [[Armor/Legends|armor]], the droid mounted a [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]] on its left [[Limb/Legends|arm]], and a portable [[Proton torpedo launcher/Legends|proton torpedo launcher]] with a magazine of three [[Proton torpedo/Legends|torpedoes]] was built into the right arm.<ref name="dirp" />

==Behind the scenes==
RX5-TLN appeared in "[[Death Is Remotely Possible]]," the third adventure in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' published by [[West End Games]] in [[1995]].<ref name="TDC">''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]''</ref>
